meaning: n.淀粉,[喻] 拘谨,古板,生硬,淀粉,浆粉
examples: There's too much starch in your diet.
Sugar and starch are broken down in the stomach.
It's important to rinse the rice to remove the starch.
The tax also applies to bags made from paper, plant-based material, or natural starch.
None of the starch should have developed and the pod should snap when popped open.
